dublinCore.dc:title: 116 SRES 21 ATS: To constitute the minority party's membership on certain committees for the One Hundred Sixteenth Congress, or until their successors are chosen.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Schumer submitted the following resolution; which was considered and agreed to

form.official-title: To constitute the minority party's membership on certain committees for the One Hundred Sixteenth Congress, or until their successors are chosen.

section.text: That the following shall constitute the minority party's membership on the following committees for the One Hundred Sixteenth Congress, or until their successors are chosen:

header.committee-name: Committee on Energy and Natural Resources:

committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Manchin, Mr. Wyden, Ms. Cantwell, Mr. Sanders, Ms. Stabenow, Mr. Heinrich, Ms. Hirono, Mr. King, Ms. Cortez Masto.
